priority.else_if: surface == PAVED || surface == ASPHALT || surface == CONCRETE || surface == PAVING_STONES || surface == COBBLESTONE || track_type == GRADE1

road_class != TRACK && surface != UNPAVED && surface != GRAVEL && surface != FINE_GRAVEL && surface != COMPACTED && surface != DIRT && surface != GROUND && surface != SAND && surface != GRASS && surface != WOOD
